logs.heading: A0: Determining days and running Gmail sync script

Execute the Gmail reader script with --days 2.
Monitor the process every 30 seconds for up to 10 attempts.

echo "Running Gmail sync with DAYS=$DAYS"
python /a0/usr/skills/gmail/scripts/gmail_reader.py --days $DAYS
